articles.title: Ripple Defies SEC—How the Cross-Appeal Aims to Alter Crypto Law
articles.description: Ripple intensifies its legal battle with the SEC, filing a cross-appeal that could redefine crypto regulation.

articles.title: Has Ethereum Lost Its Way?
articles.description: Is Ethereum in danger of being all things to all people and being master of none? It needs to focus on its original ambition to be a World Computer, says Ganesh Swami, co-founder of Covalent.

articles.title: Bearish for ETH: Unichain Launch Damages Ether's Value, Experts Say
articles.description: Uniswap (UNI) moving to own OP Stack chain is threat to ETH's value as asset, DeFi researcher Wajahat Mughal says

articles.title: Worldcoin Launches ‘World Chain’ Layer-2 Network with 6 Million Transactions and Counting
articles.description: Coinspeaker Worldcoin Launches ‘World Chain’ Layer-2 Network with 6 Million Transactions and Counting World Chain is built on Ethereum’s layer-2 architecture and would be seeking to address some of the issues pertinent to blockchain technology. Worldcoin Launches ‘World Chain’ Layer-2 Network with 6 Million Transactions and Counting
